scope.summary: The one-second authenticated control-probe ingress budget remains bounded and slow requests now emit a distinguishable warning.
out_of_scope: Changing the TLS handshake deadline or authentication policy.
Claiming a live openssl or R1 lane run.

entry_points.name: control probe request budget
entry_points.trace: Control-probe header and body parsing retain the one-second deadline; timed-out requests call the dedicated timeout logger before closing.

limitations: No live openssl probe or deliberately slow external client was run in this scoped verification.
